title: Editorial Photography With Structured Deep Fashion Styling
sourceTitle: Surreal Deep Teal Blazer Bird Blur Fashion Cover AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Editorial surreal fashion photograph of adult female fashion model with confident moody presence wearing structured deep teal blazer, standing against pale blue sky. Subject: adult female fashion model with confident moody presence has structured deep fashion styling and is partly obscured by bird in heavy motion blur flying across her face, creating a surreal avant-garde portrait while keeping the fashion silhouette readable. Scene: Pale blue sky backdrop with minimalist composition, high-grain paper texture, cinematic soft lighting, muted cool tones, and a magazine-cover atmosphere. Composition: Clean white vertical sidebar on the left containing bold black typography reading SKY / BLUR / STUDY; model positioned against open sky, bird motion blur crossing the face, bold black typography in sidebar, and restrained negative space. Signature Elements: Preserved surreal deep teal blazer bird blur fashion cover source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Surrealist editorial photography, 35mm film aesthetic, avant-garde fashion vibe, artistic blur, high-grain paper texture, minimalist magazine cover design, and cool cinematic softness. Color Palette: Deep teal blazer, pale blue sky, clean white sidebar, bold black typography, muted cool tones, film grain grays, and soft natural skin tones. Lighting: Cinematic soft light, gentle sky illumination, subtle paper-grain diffusion, and enough facial/wardrobe visibility behind the motion blur. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
